pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly creates these fictional employees.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this fictional manager.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated employees (Michael Chen, Sarah Jenkins) and a manager (Elena Fisher) created during task setup. The required target dates for the reviews to be scheduled are a start period of 2025-07-01, an end period of 2025-12-31, and a due date of 2026-01-15 as specified in the instructions.
